canonical_definition: The observable process of modifying a low-quality model response into a high-quality one by adding, deleting, or substituting tokens, guided by a reference or instruction.
papers: Beyond Imitation: Leveraging Fine-grained Quality Signals for Alignment
Training Socially Aligned Language Models on Simulated Social Interactions
